summary: Iteration 71 - Enhanced Seller Profile & Mandatory Product Tagging PASSED. All 11 backend tests pass. Producer profile shows seller_stats (total_sales=44.48€, total_orders=2, avg_rating=9.0, verified=true, featured_products=4, store_slug=artisan-foods-co). Customer profile correctly has NO seller_stats. Mandatory product tagging works: producer POST /api/posts without product_id returns 400 error 'Los vendedores e influencers deben vincular un producto a cada post'. Frontend UserProfilePage shows seller stats card with Ventas/Pedidos/Rating/Productos grid, 'Vendedor verificado' badge, 'Ver tienda' link, and featured products thumbnails.
passed_tests: GET /api/users/{producer_user_id}/profile - PASS (seller_stats present with all required fields)
POST /api/posts - producer with empty product_id returns 400
UI: Producer profile /user/{user_id} shows seller stats card
UI: Seller stats card shows 44€ Ventas, 2 Pedidos, 9 Rating (1 Reviews), 23 Productos
UI: Featured products thumbnails visible (4 products)
UI: HomePage shows PRODUCTOS DESTACADOS section
UI: 3 info buttons (Que es Hispaloshop, Ser Vendedor, Ser Influencer)
critical_code_review_comments: GET /users/{user_id}/profile correctly adds seller_stats only for role='producer'
seller_stats includes: total_sales, total_orders, avg_rating, review_count, total_products, featured_products (max 4), store_slug, store_tagline, verified, badges
POST /posts validation correctly enforces product_id requirement for producer/influencer roles
Error message is in Spanish: 'Los vendedores e influencers deben vincular un producto a cada post'
Frontend UserProfilePage.js correctly renders seller stats card with data-testid='seller-stats-card'
data-testid='view-store-link' present for Ver tienda link
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 verified enhanced seller profile and mandatory product tagging: 1) GET /users/{id}/profile returns seller_stats object for producers with total_sales, total_orders, avg_rating, review_count, total_products, featured_products (top 4 approved), store_slug, store_tagline, verified, badges. 2) Customers do NOT get seller_stats in profile. 3) POST /posts enforces mandatory product_id for producer/influencer roles - returns 400 if missing. 4) Frontend UserProfilePage.js renders seller stats card (data-testid='seller-stats-card') with grid layout showing Ventas/Pedidos/Rating/Productos, 'Vendedor verificado' badge, 'Ver tienda' link (data-testid='view-store-link'), and featured products thumbnails. Producer test user: user_testprod001 with store_slug='artisan-foods-co'.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
